Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

HOCON is a superset of JSON used extensively in the JVM ecosystem (Akka, Play, sbt, Spark, Kafka) for configuration. It extends JSON with:

  • Path expressions — a.b.c = value creates nested objects
  • Equals sign separator — key = value (HOCON convention)
  • Unquoted strings — keys and values without quotes when unambiguous
  • Object merging — duplicate keys merge instead of overwrite
  • Substitutions — ${var} and ${?var} references (parse only)
  • Triple-quoted strings — """...""" with no escape processing
  • Comments — # and //
  • Optional root braces — top-level without {}
Bean mapping

Round-trip fidelity matches JSON: beans, maps, lists, primitives, dates (ISO 8601), and Duration all round-trip. Substitutions and value concatenation are resolved during parse; the serializer always writes concrete values.

Usage:

String hocon = HoconSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(myBean); MyBean bean = HoconParser.DEFAULT.parse(hocon, MyBean.class); // Or use the marshaller: String hocon = Hocon.of(myBean); MyBean bean = Hocon.to(hocon, MyBean.class);

See Also:

    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    Hocon
    Annotation for customizing HOCON serialization and parsing behavior on classes, methods, and fields.
    HoconAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @Hocon annotation.
    HoconApply
    Dynamically applies a @Hocon annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    HoconApply.Array
    A collection of @HoconApply annotations.
    HoconApplyAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @HoconApply annotation.
    HoconApplyAnnotation.Applier
    Applies targeted HoconApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
    HoconApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    HoconBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to HOCON serializers and parsers.
    HoconClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to HOCON serializers and parsers.
    HoconConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in HoconSerializer and HoconParser.
    HoconConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @HoconConfig annotation.
    HoconConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies HoconConfig annotations to an HoconParser.Builder.
    HoconConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies HoconConfig annotations to an HoconSerializer.Builder.
    HoconMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to HoconClassMeta and HoconBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    HoconParser
    Parses HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) text into POJO models.
    HoconParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    HoconParserSession
    Session for parsing HOCON format into POJOs.
    HoconParserSession.Builder
    Builder for HOCON parser session.
    HoconResolver
    Resolves ${var} and ${?
    HoconSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation).
    HoconSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    HoconSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to HOCON format.
    HoconSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder for HOCON serializer session.
    HoconTokenizer
    Tokenizer for HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format.
    HoconTokenizer.Token
    A token with optional string or number value.
    HoconTokenizer.TokenType
    Token types produced by the tokenizer.
    HoconValue
    Intermediate representation for parsed HOCON data before conversion to Java beans.
    HoconValue.HoconArray
    HOCON array (maps to List or array).
    HoconValue.HoconBoolean
    HOCON boolean value.
    HoconValue.HoconConcat
    HOCON value concatenation (adjacent values concatenated).
    HoconValue.HoconNull
    HOCON null value.
    HoconValue.HoconNumber
    HOCON number value.
    HoconValue.HoconObject
    HOCON object (maps to Java bean or Map).
    HoconValue.HoconString
    HOCON string value.
    HoconValue.HoconSubstitution
    HOCON substitution reference (${var} or ${?
    HoconValue.Type
    Value type.
    HoconWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing HOCON format.
